# Theme Docs Index

Bu klasor, tema gecisiyle ilgili tum operasyonel dokumanlari tek yerde toplar.

## Klasor Yapisi

- checklists/
  - theme-master-checklist.md
  - visual-regression-checklist.md
  - visual-baseline-manifest.md
- foundation/
  - theme-system-phase1.md
- plans/
  - semantic-bridge-rollout-plan.md
- runbooks/
  - theme-rollback-playbook.md

## Nereden Baslamali

1. Durum takibi icin: checklists/theme-master-checklist.md
2. Manual kontrol icin: checklists/visual-regression-checklist.md
3. Geri donus proseduru icin: runbooks/theme-rollback-playbook.md
4. Gelecek gecis adimlari icin: plans/semantic-bridge-rollout-plan.md
